founder.name: Mr. Neelam Founder
founder.bio: With over 30 years behind the lens, our founder built Neelam Films from a single camera in 1995 into one of Delhi's most trusted production houses. A passion for storytelling and an uncompromising eye for quality remain at the heart of everything we do.
founder.quote: Every frame tells a story. Our job is to tell it beautifully.

timeline.title: The Beginning
timeline.desc: Neelam Films founded in Delhi with a vision for quality production.

timeline.title: First Big Brands
timeline.desc: Started producing corporate films for national clients.

timeline.title: Studio Expansion
timeline.desc: Launched our in-house recording & editing studio.

timeline.title: Live Events Division
timeline.desc: Expanded into full-scale live event production.

timeline.title: Going Digital
timeline.desc: Added live streaming & digital growth services.

timeline.title: 1000+ Projects
timeline.desc: Crossed a major milestone serving 500+ clients.

timeline.title: 30 Years Strong
timeline.desc: Celebrating three decades of trust & creativity.

mission: To craft compelling visual stories and unforgettable live experiences that elevate every brand we partner with — combining decades of craft with cutting-edge technology.
vision: To be the most trusted and innovative production house in India, setting the benchmark for quality, creativity, and client delight.
